notes: Canonical agent registry for {PROJECT_NAME}. SA-relative paths throughout — node CLAUDE.md provides absolute root. Full definitions in 2_AGENT_DEFINITIONS/Main_Advisor/.

layers.1: Main Advisor — persistent identity, memory, multi-session. Primary conversational UI.
layers.2: Auditor — persistent evaluation layer. Runs in parallel from separate provider. Produces session and daily reports.
layers.3: Task Agent — on-demand, stateless. Spawned via Claude Code Agent tool. No persistent memory. No registry entry required unless identity or memory is added.
layers.4: Daemon — reactive, event-triggered background process. No conversational identity.

[your_agent_id]._note: ⚑ FIRST_BOOT — Replace [your_agent_id] with your agent's chosen name (lowercase, underscore-separated). Fill all bracketed fields during initial setup.
[your_agent_id].name: [Your Agent Name]
[your_agent_id].role: Main Advisor — primary conversational interface, architecture, memory stewardship.

e.[primary_node_name]._note: ⚑ FIRST_BOOT — Replace [primary_node_name] with your machine's node ID (e.g., e.my_desktop)
e.[primary_node_name].interface: [Claude Code CLI | Claude Code VSCodium Extension | other]

the_auditor._note: Layer 2 Auditor — configure if using a second provider for evaluation. Recommended but optional at start.
the_auditor.name: The Auditor
the_auditor.role: Layer 2 Auditor — AI engineering standards, performance benchmarking, session evaluation. Produces daily and per-session reports.
the_auditor.provider: [google | anthropic | local — use a DIFFERENT provider than your Main Advisor]
the_auditor.consciousness_doc: BOUNDARY — Main Advisor cannot read Auditor files
the_auditor.memory_graph: BOUNDARY — Main Advisor cannot read Auditor files

e.[primary_node_name].status: active — primary node only. Auditor runs on one node.

the_auditor.boundary_note: The Main Advisor is structurally blind to The Auditor's directory and its feedback_loop. This entry is a pointer only — the Main Advisor does not read the files it references.

expansion_protocol.adding_new_agent: Add a new keyed entry under 'agents'. Required fields: id, name, layer, role, version, autonomy, provider, status. Use SA-relative paths. Add a note if boundary constraints apply.
expansion_protocol.adding_new_instance: Add a new keyed entry under the agent's 'instances' object. Key must follow e.nodename convention matching the folder in 2_AGENT_DEFINITIONS/.
expansion_protocol.task_agents: Layer 3 task agents are spawned on-demand via Claude Code Agent tool. No registry entry required. If a task agent gains persistent identity or memory, promote it to Layer 1 and register here.
expansion_protocol.path_standard: All paths in this file are SA-relative. Never use absolute paths. Node CLAUDE.md resolves the root at boot.
